svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="ywGe49kWgZFbxuB2MqY3" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-884" dy="-227" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="User
(browser / email / Telegram)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="60" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vercel" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;html=1;" value="Vercel (web tier — Astro 7 SSR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="380" x="230" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web" parent="vercel" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Astro pages + Vue dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="vercel" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="API routes
src/pages/api" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tgwebhook" parent="vercel" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Telegram webhook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logo" parent="vercel" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Logo proxy
(CDN cached)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="supabase" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;html=1;" value="Supabase" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="290" x="660" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sbdb" parent="supabase" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="PostgreSQL
(RLS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="100" x="25" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sbauth" parent="supabase" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Auth
(GoTrue)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="150" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vendors" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;html=1;" value="External providers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="660" x="1000" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="massive" parent="vendors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Massive
(quotes, bars, universe, logos, news, corp actions)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="finnhub" parent="vendors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Finnhub
(earnings, recs, insider)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="180" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xai" parent="vendors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="xAI / Grok
(AI summaries)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tgapi" parent="vendors" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Telegram
Bot API" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="500" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aws" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;html=1;" value="AWS (SAM stack — cron / async tier)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="1290" x="230" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnemail" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="email-dispatch
(Function URL, HMAC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnbackfill" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="vendor-backfill
(SQS consumer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnbackup" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="backup-user-settings
(5x daily)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="380" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnstats" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="compute-daily-stats
(weekdays)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="560" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnschedule" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="schedule
(every 1 min)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="740" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnmaint" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="asset-maintenance
(daily)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="920" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fnlive" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="live-provider-check
(post-deploy + cron)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1100" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sqs" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="SQS queue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="210" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="aws" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="S3
(backups)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="100" x="410" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ses" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="SES
(email)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="620" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ssm" parent="aws" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;" value="SSM Parameter Store
(Lambda secrets)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1100" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="web" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="web" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="sbauth" value="auth"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="sbdb" value="RLS reads/writes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="tgapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="tgwebhook" value="inbound updates"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.7" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="logo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.35;entryY=1;" target="massive" value="branding"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.7" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="sqs" value="symbol warmup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="fnbackfill"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="fnemail" value="HMAC POST"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnemail" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ses"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnschedule" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ses" value="bulk email"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnschedule" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="tgapi" value="messages + charts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="ses" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" target="user" value="email delivery"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="tgapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;" target="user" value="Telegram delivery"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="aws" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=0.37;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="sbdb" value="admin client (all Lambdas)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e15" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnschedule" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;entryX=0.6;entryY=1;" target="massive" value="quotes / bars"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnmaint" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;" target="massive" value="corp actions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e17" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnmaint" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="finnhub" value="earnings"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> summaries"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e20" edge="1" parent="1" source="fnbackup" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="s3">
